root: in(进入)+augur(预兆)+ate(动词)→预兆进入→开始
meaning: 开始, 举行...就职典礼
example_sentence: The new president will inaugurate her term with a speech at the Capitol.

meaning: 入会, 开始\na. 新加入的\nvt. 开始, 传授基本知识给
example_sentence: The government has initiated a nationwide campaign to promote renewable energy.

root: in(进入)+it(走)+iative(名词)→开始→主动性
meaning: 主动行动, 首创精神, 主动权\na. 自发的, 起始的
example_sentence: She demonstrated strong leadership and initiative by launching the community recycling program without waiting for approval.

root: in(进入)+it(走)+ial(形容词)→走进→开始的
meaning: 字首, 首字母\na. 开始的, 最初的, 字首的\nvt. 用姓名的首字母签名
example_sentence: Her report was rejected in its initial stage due to insufficient data.

root: intro(向内)+duc(引导)+e→向内引导→介绍
meaning: 介绍, 引入, 采用, 输入\n[法] 引进, 输入, 介绍
example_sentence: The professor introduced the new research methodology at the international conference.

meaning: 改革, 创新\n[法] 创新, 改革, 刷新
example_sentence: The company's success is largely attributed to its commitment to technological innovation.

root: auct(增加)+ion→价格不断增加→拍卖
meaning: 拍卖\nvt. 拍卖
example_sentence: The rare manuscript was sold at auction for over $2 million.

root: bank(银行)+rupt(打破)→银行破产→破产
meaning: 破产者\na. 破产的\nvt. 使破产
example_sentence: The company was declared bankrupt after failing to restructure its massive debt.

root: barg(争论)+ain(名词)→讨价还价→便宜货
meaning: 交易, 买卖协定, 特价商品\nv. 讲价, 交易
example_sentence: The two companies signed a bargain to jointly develop the new technology.

root: brok(破)+er(人)→打破交易的人→经纪人
meaning: 掮客, 经纪人\n[经] 经纪人, 掮客
example_sentence: The stockbroker executed the client's order to buy 500 shares of the tech company.

meaning:
预算
vi. 编预算
vt. 编入预算, 安排
a. 廉价的
example_sentence: The government announced a $2 trillion budget to address climate change and infrastructure renewal.

meaning: 裂口, 违背, 破坏, 违反, 突破, 破裂\nvt. 攻破, 突破\nvi. 跳出水面
example_sentence: The company was sued for breach of contract after failing to deliver the goods on time.

root: ass(分配)+et→分配到的财物→资产
meaning: 资产, 有益的东西
example_sentence: Human capital is a critical intangible asset for knowledge-based economies.

meaning: 厩, 停车处, 牧师职位, 货摊, 托辞, 拖延\nvt. 关入厩, 停顿, 推托, 支吾, 使陷于泥中\nvi. 被关在厩内, 陷于泥中, 停止, 支吾
example_sentence: The pilot managed to recover from the stall just before the aircraft lost altitude.

root: butter(黄油)+fly(飞)→黄油色的飞虫→蝴蝶
meaning: 蝴蝶\n[医] 蝶式棉块, 翼形皮癣, 纸蝶
example_sentence: The monarch butterfly migrates thousands of miles across North America each year.

root: Latin 'ad-'(to) + 'ligare'(to bind) → 'alligare' (to bind to) → Old French 'allegiance' → bound to a ruler or cause → loyalty and commitment owed to a sovereign, nation, or principle
meaning: 忠贞, 效忠
example_sentence: Citizens swear allegiance to the constitution during the naturalization ceremony.

meaning: 怪异的, 超自然的, 不可思议的\nn. 命运, 预言, 符咒
example_sentence: The old house gave off a weird, almost eerie vibe that made everyone uneasy.

meaning: 纤维, 构造, 纤维制品\n[化] 纤维
example_sentence: Dietary fibre is essential for maintaining healthy digestion and preventing constipation.

root: e(出)+lig(选择)+ible(可…的)→可被选出的→合格的
meaning: 有资格当选的, 合格的\nn. 有资格者, 合格者, 适任者
example_sentence: All citizens over 18 are eligible to vote in national elections.

meaning: 捐赠
example_sentence: Many alumni donated generously to the university's scholarship fund.

meaning: 珍爱, 怀有, 爱护
example_sentence: She has always cherished the memory of her grandmother's kindness.

meaning: 唤醒, 使觉醒, 激发\nvi. 觉醒, 醒来
example_sentence: The sudden thunderstorm wakened the entire neighborhood.

meaning: 青铜, 铜像\na. 青铜色的
example_sentence: The museum displayed a 5th-century BCE Greek bronze of Apollo.

meaning: 教师, 老师, 导师
example_sentence: Her dedication as a teacher has inspired generations of students to pursue academic excellence.

meaning: 疲倦的, 萎靡的, 厌倦的, 厌烦的\nvt. 使疲倦, 使厌烦\nvi. 疲乏, 生厌, 不耐烦
example_sentence: After ten hours of intense revision, she felt utterly weary and struggled to focus on the final practice test.

root: re(加强)+li(绑)+ance(名词)→绑在一起→依赖
meaning: 信任, 信赖, 受信赖的人(或事)\n[法] 信任, 信赖, 信心
example_sentence: The company's heavy reliance on imported raw materials makes it vulnerable to global supply chain disruptions.

meaning: 支持, 长枕\nvt. 支持, 支撑
example_sentence: The recent study provides compelling evidence to bolster the theory of cognitive flexibility.

meaning: 中级的, 中等的, 次要的, 第二的, 从属的, 辅助的\n[化] 仲(指CH-3...CH(CH-3)-型支链烃基或指二元胺及R-2CHOH型的醇); 第二
example_sentence: Secondary education in most countries follows primary school and typically includes grades 7 to 12.

meaning: 有恶意的, 恶性的, 有害的\n[化] 恶性的
example_sentence: The biopsy confirmed that the tumor was malignant, requiring immediate surgical intervention.

root: an(未)+ec(出)+dote(给)→未公开的故事→轶事
meaning: 轶事, 奇闻
example_sentence: The speaker began her TED Talk with a humorous anecdote about her first day as a teacher.

meaning: 大使\n[法] 大使, 使节, 代理
example_sentence: The U.S. ambassador to China delivered a keynote speech on bilateral trade at the forum.

meaning: 联合抵制\nvt. 联合抵制
example_sentence: The union called for a boycott of all products made by the company until fair wages were restored.

root: dis(分开)+pos(放置)+al(名词)→分开放置→处理
meaning: 丢掉, 处理, 排列, 销毁, 布置\n[医] 处理, 处置
example_sentence: The company has implemented a new system for the safe disposal of hazardous chemicals.

meaning: 地球, 泥土, 世界, 尘世\nvt. 埋入土中, 赶入洞内\nvi. 躲入洞内
example_sentence: Climate change poses a serious threat to the entire Earth and its ecosystems.

root: pro(向前)+mise(发送)→向前发送→承诺
meaning: 诺言, 约定的事情, 有指望\nvt. 允诺, 约定, 预示\nvi. 允诺, 有前途, 有指望
example_sentence: She made a solemn promise to uphold the principles of academic integrity.

meaning: 速记\n[法] 速记法, 速记, 记录文字
example_sentence: She took notes in shorthand during the fast-paced legal deposition.

root: al(加强)+loy(法律)→按法律混合→合金
meaning: 合金\nvt. 将...铸成合金, 减低成色\nvi. 合铸
example_sentence: Steel is a widely used alloy of iron and carbon.

meaning:
重新开始, 取回, 恢复
vi. 再开始
n. 摘要, 个人简历
[计] 继续执行
example_sentence: After the power outage, the server resumed processing requests automatically.

meaning: 鹿
example_sentence: The conservation efforts have led to a significant increase in the deer population in the national park.

root: typ(类型)+ical(形容词)→类型的→典型的
meaning: 典型的, 象征性的\n[医] 典型的
example_sentence: It is typical of her to arrive early and prepare everything before the meeting.

meaning: 流线, 流线型\nvt. 使成流线型, 使合理化
example_sentence: The company streamlined its supply chain to reduce costs and improve delivery times.

meaning: 触觉, 碰, 触, 机灵, 轻触, 格调, 少许, 缺点, 弹力\nvt. 接触, 触摸, 触及, 使接触, 达到, 涉及, 影响到, 使轻度受害, 感动\nvi. 触摸, 接近, 涉及, 提到
example_sentence: The sculpture's smooth surface invited visitors to touch it gently.

meaning: 有磁性的, 有吸引力的, 催眠术的\n[医] 磁[性]的
example_sentence: Her magnetic personality made her the natural leader of the debate team.

root: dis(分开)+st(站立)+ant(形容词)→分开站立的→遥远的
meaning: 远的, 疏远的\n[经] 远期的
example_sentence: The distant mountains were barely visible through the morning mist.

meaning:
噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹
vt. 谣传
vi. 喧闹
[计] 噪声
example_sentence: The constant noise from the construction site made it impossible to concentrate during the exam.

meaning: 缝合线, 衔接口, 接缝, 线缝, 伤疤\nvt. 缝合, 接合, 焊合, 使留下伤痕\nvi. 裂开, 发生裂痕
example_sentence: The surgeon carefully closed the incision with fine sutures, ensuring no visible seam remained.

root: find(找到)+ing(动名词)→找到的东西→发现
meaning: 发现, 发现物, 决定, 裁决\n[法] 调查结果, 对事实的认定, 判定的要素
example_sentence: The study's key finding was that regular exercise significantly improves cognitive function in older adults.

meaning: 缺席, 缺乏, 没有\n[医] 失神
example_sentence: His absence from school was noticed.

meaning:
地带, 带, 地区
vt. 环绕, 使分成地带
vi. 分成区
[计] 卡片顶部的三行区; 区; 区域
example_sentence: The city council designated the old industrial area as a redevelopment zone.

root: com(一起)+part(部分)+ment(名词)→放在一起的部分→隔间
meaning: 分隔间, 卧车包房, 防水舱隔\n[医] 隔室, 隔间
example_sentence: The train compartment was quiet and comfortably furnished with individual reading lights.
